meaning: Archipelago[廖内群岛[印度尼西亚西部](在马六甲海峡的东南入口)
examples: As elsewhere in Indonesia, peat in Riau is disappearing.
Within Indonesia, the situation is most critical in Riau.
In 1982 more than three-quarters of Riau was forested. Only about a quarter is now.
Chaidir, the speaker of Riau's provincial assembly, concedes that Riau's regents have a spendthrift penchant for prestige projects.
Riau, for example, produces more than 70% of the nation's oil and gas.
